verbatim_quote: And as you can see, I verified I think all of these people do exist in some capacity on the Cornell website. So no hallucinated faculty members, but I was surprised that the agent was telling me I should be meeting with the provost of computer science rather than asking me maybe what are my research interests and trying to match faculty with that.
